summary: Read/write/list files under one or more sandboxed paths. Standard MCP filesystem server.

requires.install: Install Node.js 20+ (https://nodejs.org). npx ships with npm.

notes: Sandbox path defaults to the current directory. Edit args to scope tighter (e.g. ./docs). The server is fetched on first start via npx; subsequent starts are cached.
hardRuleNotes: Rule #5 OK: server runs as a local subprocess; no provider SDK in framework code.
Rule #3 OK: no hosted backend; transport is stdio.
